rationale: Educ. Code §12.026 governs continuity of school district governing body members when a home-rule charter changes. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: If the adoption, amendment, or revocation of a home-rule school district charter changes the structure of the governing body of the school district, the members of the governing body serving on the date the adoption, amendment, or revocation takes effect continue in office until their successors are chosen and have qualified for office.
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this provision on home-rule charter governing body continuity.
